name: Ken Thompson
why_notable: Co-created Unix (1969) with Dennis Ritchie at Bell Labs. Wrote wc as part of Unix v1 (1971). Co-invented the B language (precursor to C) and co-designed C. Created the Go programming language at Google (2007). Turing Award winner (1983). The OS lineage and language lineage behind virtually every security tool — Kali Linux, every Go recon tool, every C-based exploit — traces back to his work. One of the most consequential engineers in computing history.
